summary: Road display names absent from export pipeline; .topo attrs are sparse numeric IDs (13/761 segments) with no decodable name strings. Curated road-names.json ships for Everon major routes.

sources.result: roadClass + geometry only — no name field on any segment
761 road polylines; 13 carry u32 attr blobs (e.g. 44, 200, 48) — geometry/class only, no UTF-8 name

sources.method: Workbench MCP RoadEntity / SCR_Road attribute search (docs/mod/MCP_TOOLING.md)
sources.result: No name string attribute surfaced in offline spike; Path A export extension deferred

sources.method: Arma Reforger Everon map literacy + operator MAJOR_EVERON_ROADS list (spec L1)

acceptance: G2 path B with evidence — curated JSON IN SCOPE per spec L2
